title: Create: Automation Galore
description: A mod that adds illogical and sometimes unbalanced Create Mod recipes for lazy people.
body:
# Create: Automation Galore
### An illogical Create recipe mod that adds random and sometimes unbalanced recipe for vanilla and Create items.

# This mod requires Create!

**Also available on CurseForge [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-automation-galore).**

Made with MCreator :)

**Most of the recipes are very unbalanced ! This mod was originally made for personal use, but I decided to upload it to Modrinth for other people, such as my friends, to try it.**

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

This mod adds 20+ recipes for things like Blaze Rods, Ender Pearls, Elytras and more basic things such as Andesite, Netherrack, multiple ores or Redstone.

</details>
